initial_description:
I have a google drive folder called 'Guidelines' whenever a new file is added i need you to send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject "guideline added" and a message in the mail: "Dear finance department, a new file was added to the guideline folder. Please check whether this is correct." (the message should include the file's name and a link to the file).
If the assistant asks about a detail that is not described on this card, just choose whatever makes sense to you. There is no wrong answer."

interactions.question: Should the email include the file name and link in the message body, or also in the subject line?
interactions.answer: the message is in body and the file name is not important to the mail
interactions.updated_description: I have a Google Drive folder called 'Guidelines'. Whenever a new file is added, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject 'guideline added' and this message in the body: 'Dear finance department, a new file was added to the guideline folder. Please check whether this is correct.' Include a link to the file in the message body. The file name is not important to the email.

interactions.question: Should the email be sent for every new file added to the folder, or only for certain file types?
interactions.updated_description: I have a Google Drive folder called 'Guidelines'. Whenever every new file is added, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject 'guideline added' and this message in the body: 'Dear finance department, a new file was added to the guideline folder. Please check whether this is correct.' Include a link to the file in the message body. The file name is not important to the email.

interactions.question: Should the email include the link to the new file only, or also the folder link to 'Guidelines'?
interactions.updated_description: I have a Google Drive folder called 'Guidelines'. Whenever a new file is added, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject 'guideline added' and this message in the body: 'Dear finance department, a new file was added to the guideline folder. Please check whether this is correct.' Include a link to the new file only in the message body. The file name is not important to the email.

interactions.question: How often would you like me to check the Guidelines folder for new files — every minute, or less often?
interactions.updated_description: I have a Google Drive folder called 'Guidelines'. Check it every minute, and whenever a new file is added, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject 'guideline added' and this message in the body: 'Dear finance department, a new file was added to the guideline folder. Please check whether this is correct.' Include a link to the new file only in the message body. The file name is not important to the email.

Check it every minute, and whenever a new file is added, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject 'guideline added' and this message in the body: 'Dear finance department, a new file was added to the guideline folder. interactions.question: Should the subject line be "guideline added", or would you like to change it?
interactions.updated_description: I have a Google Drive folder called 'Guidelines'. Check it every minute, and whenever a new file is added, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject 'guideline added' and this message in the body: 'Dear finance department, a new file was added to the guideline folder. Please check whether this is correct.' Include a link to the new file only in the message body. The file name is not important to the email.

interactions.question: Should the email body be: “Dear finance department, a new file was added to the guideline folder. Please check whether this is correct. Link to the file: [webViewLink]” — or would you like to change it? (The bracketed parts — like [Expense name] — will be automatically replaced with the real values when the automation runs.)
interactions.updated_description: I have a Google Drive folder called 'Guidelines'. Check it every minute, and whenever a new file is added, send an email to finance@acmecorp.com with the subject 'guideline added' and this message in the body: 'Dear finance department, a new file was added to the guideline folder. Please check whether this is correct. Link to the file: [webViewLink]'. Include a link to the new file only in the message body. The file name is not important to the email.

parameter_set.value: Dear finance department, a new file was added to the guideline folder. Please check whether this is correct. Link to the file: {{file_object.webViewLink}}
